# @voiceqa/shared-types

Generated TypeScript types from FastAPI's OpenAPI document.

**Do not edit `src/api.ts` by hand.** Regenerate with `make codegen` from the
repo root, which boots `apps/api`, dumps `app.openapi()` to `openapi.json`,
and runs `openapi-typescript` against it.

Until codegen lands, `src/api.ts` is a hand-written placeholder that keeps
`apps/web` compiling (every path is untyped).
